# hooks-bootstrapUser

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for bootstrapUser

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useBootstrapUserMutation(); mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useBootstrapUserMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useBootstrapUserMutation();
mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```
